node1.name:
+#% chance to <col=*>Regenerate</col> runes, ammo and charges

<col=*>Regenerate</col>: Whenever you use runes to cast a spell, fire ammunition from a ranged weapon or consume charges with a charged weapon there is a % chance to generate an additional resource spent.

node10.name: +#% chance to <col=*>Regenerate</col> runes, ammo and charges.

node100.name: Healing with Demonic Pacts overheals you, up to +#% of your base Hitpoints level.

node101.name: All attacks have +#% Prayer penetration (up to 100%).

node102.name: While protection prayers are not active, you restore 1 Prayer point every 15 ticks (9s), this is sped up by 1 tick (0.6s) for every 7 worn prayer bonus you have.

node103.name: All attacks have +#% Prayer penetration (up to 100%).

node106.name: All attacks have +#% Prayer penetration (up to 100%).

node107.name: Air spells deal +#% damage for each active prayer.

node108.name:
+#% Magic damage

This bonus is multiplied by the Tumeken's Shadow special effect.

+10% accuracy in all combat styles.

node109.name: Air spells have a +#% chance to max hit for every 1 prayer bonus, this chance is doubled against enemies weak to air spells.

node111.name: Smoke spells now count as 'air' spells.

node112.name: Water spells deal increased damage the higher health percentage you have (+20% damage at 100% health).

node113.name:
+#% Magic damage

This bonus is multiplied by the Tumeken's Shadow special effect.

+10% accuracy in all combat styles.

node114.name: Water spell hits bounce back to you, healing you for the 60% of the damage dealt to your target.

node117.name:
Fire spell casts burn up to 6% of your maximum Hitpoints to increase your damage dealt by double the amount burned for.

This effect cannot kill you directly.

node118.name:
+#% Magic damage

This bonus is multiplied by the Tumeken's Shadow special effect.

node119.name: Fire spell hits apply 1 burn (max 5) and bounce to up to 2 nearby targets.

node12.name: While an off-hand item is equipped, gain +5 melee strength, +5 ranged strength and +2% magic damage.

node122.name:
Attack rate with combat spells in a spellbook is sped up by # ticks.

This cannot reduce attack rate below 2 ticks (1.2s).

node123.name: Ice spells now count as 'water' spells.

node124.name: Blood spells now count as 'fire' spells.

node127.name: Earth spell hits reduce the enemies Defence & Magic Defence levels by 2.

All one handed powered staves have their max hit reduced by 8

This cannot reduce attack rate below 1 tick (0.6s).

node157.name:
When hitting a target with a two handed melee weapon, you have a 5% chance to trigger a <col=*>Ranged echo</col> as if you have a bow, crossbow and thrown weapon equipped.

<col=*>Ranged echo</col>: An additional ranged attack which rolls with your melee stats instead of ranged. Echo attacks cannot trigger additional echo attacks.

node44.name:
Whenever your combat spells <col=*>Regenerate</col> runes, your Magic level is boosted by 1 for 30 ticks (18s).

This boost cannot exceed 10 Magic levels and additional triggers reset the duration.

node45.name: Whenever your combat spells <col=*>Regenerate</col> air runes, you have a #% chance to restore 1 prayer point per rune regenerated.

node46.name: Whenever your combat spells <col=*>Regenerate</col> water runes, you're healed for 1 per rune regenerated.

node47.name: Whenever your combat spells <col=*>Regenerate</col> fire runes, the damage of your next spell hit is increased by # per rune regenerated.

node48.name:
Whenever your combat spells <col=*>Regenerate</col> earth runes, your Defence level is boosted by 1 per rune regenerated for 30 ticks (18s).

This boost cannot exceed 20% of your base Defence level and additional triggers reset the duration.

node71.name:
While you have a shield equipped you gain the <col=*>Thorns</col> effect

<col=*>Thorns</col>: Whenever you're attacked enemies will be instantly hit with # melee damage. This effect can only trigger once per hit-splat and will trigger if you take 0 damage. Other pacts will specify if they effect <col=*>Thorns</col>.

node72.name:
Melee weapons under 1kg always trigger an additional melee hit using 40% of your base max hit (minimum of 1)

This will not trigger on special attacks.

node73.name:
Each melee attack with a heavy melee weapon (>=1kg) has a #% chance to trigger an instant <col=*>Blindbag</col> attack.

<col=*>Blindbag</col>: Automatically attack your current target with a random heavy melee weapon in your inventory as though you have equipped it, ignoring all stat requirements and attack delay. <col=*>Blindbag</col> attacks can trigger additional <col=*>Blindbag</col> attacks but cannot trigger from special attacks.

node74.name:
Your minimum hit when attacking with a melee weapon is increased by #.

This minimum hit is further increased by # for each additional tile between you and the target.

node79.name: Melee weapons that are under 1kg or one handed, increase your melee strength by 20% of your Strength level.
